---
title: "\'Authorship\' [12 in the series \'Work and Workers, by the actual Workers\']"
---

## \'Authorship\' [12 in the series \'Work and Workers, by the actual Workers\']

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1892
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (September 1892) 296-304

### Notes

Reprinted in Battiscombe and Laski, 185-92.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
